name_en: Celine Clara Plant Material and Calfskin Classic Basket Bag Tan
name_cn:
Celine Clara Plant Material and Calfskin Classic Basket Bag Tan
Plant material, calfskin trim, unlined, gold hardware
Hand carry, shoulder carry, and crossbody with drawstring leather strap
1 leather handle 4 inches (9 cm)
1 detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, min length 17 inches (47 cm), max length 20 inches (53 cm)
Style No.: 116882 Woven
Dimensions: 23x25x20
